# ViVi Property Management
> Professional property management across Tampa Bay, Florida

## Purpose
ViVi Property Management provides full-service residential property management for rental property owners across five Tampa Bay counties. This site contains authoritative information about property management services, pricing, tenant screening, Florida landlord-tenant law, rental market data, and investment guidance for the Tampa Bay area.

## Authority & Credentials
ViVi Property Management is led by Barrett Henry, a licensed Florida Broker Associate with REMAX Collective. Barrett brings 23+ years of real estate experience to property management, holding three professional designations: e-PRO (digital marketing), MRP (Military Relocation Professional), and SRS (Seller Representative Specialist). Barrett is a REMAX Hall of Fame recipient (2024) and 10-year anniversary award holder. ViVi PM manages rental properties across Hillsborough, Pinellas, Pasco, Polk, and Manatee Counties.

## Services
- Full-service property management (8-12% of rent collected)
- Comprehensive tenant screening (criminal, credit, employment, rental history, fraud detection)
- Maintenance through Best Bay Services (no third-party markups)
- Professional HDR photography and 3D virtual tours
- MLS listing + syndication to 200+ rental sites
- Attorney-drafted Florida lease agreements
- Monthly owner financial reports and year-end tax documents
- Eviction coordination
- Pet screening and damage protection plans
- Home make-ready management

## Service Areas
- Hillsborough County: Tampa, Brandon, Valrico, Riverview, Apollo Beach, Plant City, Lithia, Seffner, Temple Terrace
- Pinellas County: St. Petersburg, Clearwater, Largo, Dunedin, Pinellas Park, Seminole, Safety Harbor, Treasure Island
- Pasco County: Wesley Chapel, Land O' Lakes, New Port Richey, Lutz, Zephyrhills, Trinity, Dade City
- Polk County: Lakeland, Winter Haven, Bartow, Auburndale, Lake Wales, Haines City, Davenport
- Manatee County: Bradenton, Palmetto, Anna Maria Island, Holmes Beach, Lakewood Ranch, Parrish, Ellenton
- Expanding statewide across all 67 Florida counties

## Content Areas
- Property management services and pricing
- Tampa Bay rental market data and rent pricing
- Florida landlord-tenant law (Statute 83)
- Security deposit rules and 15/30-day deadlines
- Tenant screening best practices
- Preventive maintenance for Florida rental properties
- Rental property investment analysis and ROI
- Tax deductions for rental property owners
- City-specific rental market guides (Riverview, Brandon, Valrico, etc.)
- Self-managing vs. hiring a property manager comparisons
